mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, bucket_display_name, storage_type, region, user_id, user_type, tenant_id, api_key_id, storage_class, data_redundancy_type, acl_type, max_file_size, max_file_count, max_storage_size, allowed_file_types, blocked_file_types, domain_name, cdn_enabled, cdn_domain, versioning_enabled, cors_enabled, watermark_enabled, encryption_enabled, lifecycle_enabled, transfer_acceleration_enabled, current_file_count, current_storage_size, storage_used_quota, endpoint, status, auto_renew_enabled, tags, category, description, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted_time, is_deleted, lifecycle_config, cors_config, referer_config, bucket_policy, replication_config, access_monitor_config, inventory_config, website_config, logging_config, worm_config
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bucket_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM bucket_config WHERE api_key_id = #{apiKeyId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM bucket_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM bucket_config WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT FROM bucket_config WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bucket_config ( bucket_name, bucket_display_name, storage_type, region, user_id, api_key_id, user_type, tenant_id, storage_class, data_redundancy_type, acl_type, max_file_size, max_file_count, max_storage_size, allowed_file_types, blocked_file_types, domain_name, cdn_enabled, cdn_domain, versioning_enabled, cors_enabled, watermark_enabled, encryption_enabled, lifecycle_enabled, current_file_count, current_storage_size, storage_used_quota, endpoint, status, auto_renew_enabled, tags, category, description, created_by, lifecycle_config, cors_config, referer_config, bucket_policy, replication_config, access_monitor_config, inventory_config, website_config, logging_config, worm_config ) VALUES ( #{bucketName}, #{bucketDisplayName}, #{storageType}, #{region}, #{userId}, #{apiKeyId}, #{userType}, #{tenantId}, #{storageClass}, #{dataRedundancyType}, #{aclType}, #{maxFileSize}, #{maxFileCount}, #{maxStorageSize}, #{allowedFileTypes}, #{blockedFileTypes}, #{domainName}, #{cdnEnabled}, #{cdnDomain}, #{versioningEnabled}, #{corsEnabled}, #{watermarkEnabled}, #{encryptionEnabled}, #{lifecycleEnabled}, #{currentFileCount}, #{currentStorageSize}, #{storageUsedQuota}, #{endpoint}, #{status}, #{autoRenewEnabled}, #{tags}, #{category}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{lifecycleConfig}, #{corsConfig}, #{refererConfig}, #{bucketPolicy}, #{replicationConfig}, #{accessMonitorConfig}, #{inventoryConfig}, #{websiteConfig}, #{loggingConfig}, #{wormConfig} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bucket_config SET current_storage_size = current_storage_size + #{size}, current_file_count = current_file_count + #{count}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE bucket_config SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
UPDATE bucket_config SET is_deleted = 1, status = 'DELETED', deleted_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName}
